description: next-evals agent-030: migrate a complex Pages Router app to App Router

assertions.name: isTrue(app/layout.tsx exists)
assertions.group: Root layout exists and replaces _app/_document

assertions.name: includes(/<html.*lang/)
assertions.group: Root layout exists and replaces _app/_document

assertions.name: includes(/<body/)
assertions.group: Root layout exists and replaces _app/_document

assertions.name: includes(/metadata|Metadata/)
assertions.group: Root layout exists and replaces _app/_document

assertions.name: includes(/children.*ReactNode/)
assertions.group: Root layout exists and replaces _app/_document

assertions.name: isTrue(app/page.tsx exists)
assertions.group: Home page migrated to Server Component with async data fetching

assertions.name: includes(/export\s+default\s+async\s+function|async\s+function.*Page/)
assertions.group: Home page migrated to Server Component with async data fetching

assertions.name: excludes(/['"]use client['"];?/)
assertions.group: Home page migrated to Server Component with async data fetching

assertions.name: includes(/await\s+fetch|fetch\(/)
assertions.group: Home page migrated to Server Component with async data fetching

assertions.name: excludes(/getServerSideProps/, stripComments)
assertions.group: Home page migrated to Server Component with async data fetching

assertions.name: isTrue(app/blog/page.tsx exists)
assertions.group: Blog index migrated with ISR equivalent

assertions.name: includes(/export\s+default\s+async\s+function|async\s+function/)
assertions.group: Blog index migrated with ISR equivalent

assertions.name: includes(/revalidate.*\d+|next.*revalidate|export.*const.*revalidate.*=.*\d+/)
assertions.group: Blog index migrated with ISR equivalent

assertions.name: excludes(/getStaticProps/, stripComments)
assertions.group: Blog index migrated with ISR equivalent

assertions.name: isTrue(dynamic blog route exists)
assertions.group: Dynamic blog route migrated to generateStaticParams

assertions.name: includes(/export.*generateStaticParams|generateStaticParams.*export/)
assertions.group: Dynamic blog route migrated to generateStaticParams

assertions.name: includes(/export\s+default\s+async\s+function|async\s+function/)
assertions.group: Dynamic blog route migrated to generateStaticParams

assertions.name: excludes(/getStaticPaths|getStaticProps/, stripComments)
assertions.group: Dynamic blog route migrated to generateStaticParams

assertions.name: isTrue(posts route handler exists)
assertions.group: API routes migrated to Route Handlers

assertions.name: includes(/export.*GET|export.*POST/)
assertions.group: API routes migrated to Route Handlers

assertions.name: includes(/Request|Response|NextRequest|NextResponse/)
assertions.group: API routes migrated to Route Handlers

assertions.name: isTrue(dynamic posts route handler exists)
assertions.group: API routes migrated to Route Handlers

assertions.name: includes(/export.*GET|export.*PUT|export.*DELETE/)
assertions.group: API routes migrated to Route Handlers

assertions.name: includes(/export.*metadata|metadata.*Metadata/)
assertions.group: Metadata API replaces next/head

assertions.name: excludes(/import.*Head.*next\/head|<Head>/)
assertions.group: Metadata API replaces next/head

assertions.name: includes(/export.*metadata|metadata.*Metadata/)
assertions.group: Metadata API replaces next/head

assertions.name: excludes(/import.*Head.*next\/head|<Head>/)
assertions.group: Metadata API replaces next/head

assertions.name: isTrue(app/error.tsx exists)
assertions.group: Error handling migrated to error.js and not-found.js

assertions.name: includes(/['"]use client['"];?/)
assertions.group: Error handling migrated to error.js and not-found.js

assertions.name: includes(/error.*Error|Error.*error/)
assertions.group: Error handling migrated to error.js and not-found.js

assertions.name: isTrue(app/not-found.tsx exists)
assertions.group: Error handling migrated to error.js and not-found.js

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/_app.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/_document.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/_error.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/404.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/index.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/blog/index.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/blog/[id].js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/api/posts/index.js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: fileDeleted(pages/api/posts/[id].js)
assertions.group: Pages Router directory removed

assertions.name: excludes(/getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths/)
assertions.group: Final source free of legacy Pages APIs and imports

assertions.name: excludes(/\bfrom\s+['"]next\/(?:head|router)['"]|import\s+['"]next\/(?:head|router)['"]/)
assertions.group: Final source free of legacy Pages APIs and imports
